name: Extension of Time for Payment of Taxes by Corporations Expecting Carrybacks

eligibility.description: Must be a corporation that files a statement (Form 1138) predicting a net operating loss carryback from the current taxable year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Corporations expecting a net operating loss in the current year can extend the time for payment of taxes for the immediately preceding taxable year.
